message: Living Savior Angel Tree Supporting Shelter/Artemis House & NOVACO Gifts due by Tuesday, December 15th

The Cathedral Brass 2020 Christmas Concert! Please join in as a member of our virtual audience on Sunday, 6 December, from 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM as The Cathedral Brass once again graces us by celebrating and sharing the joy of the season. They will be performing sans a live audience, but live streaming from the Vienna Presbyterian Church (VPC). To view the concert, visit the VPC home page, and in the upper right, click on the “Watch and Listen” dropdown tab where the live stream link will be.

THANK YOU!!! Living Savior,Bridgeway and Ambiente together provided 40 families with complete (and then some) Thanksgiving Meals. What an incredible outpouring of generosity to our Neighbors in need in an especially trying time. The Thanksgiving “baskets” were delivered to families served by Shelter House and Artemis House/NOVACO,families who are homeless,in transitional housing,or victims of domestic violence. THANK YOU!!!
